channel.title: SPL - Central Library
channel.description: Upcoming events for SPL - Central Library

item.title: Collection Spotlight Exhibit
item.description:
Thursday, March 26, 2026 at 10 AM

Location: Central Library, Level 8 - Gallery

This exhibit highlights the diversity and depth of The Seattle Public Library’s collection, composed of over two million items.

Event details

item.title: Free Tax Help
item.description:
Thursday, March 26, 2026 at 12:30 PM

Location: Central Library, Level 5 - Mixing Chamber Meeting Room

Trained volunteers will be available to answer questions and prepare personal tax returns.

Event details

item.title: Author talk: LJ Andrews & S.A. MacLean discuss "Heir of Twisted Lies"
item.description:
Thursday, March 26, 2026 at 7 PM

Location: Central Library, Level 1 - Auditorium

Join us for a conversation between LJ Andrews and S.A. MacLean.

Event details

item.description:

This exhibit highlights the diversity and depth of The Seattle Public Library’s collection, composed of over two million items.

item.description:
Tuesday, March 31, 2026 at 12:30 PM

Location: Central Library, Level 5 - Mixing Chamber Meeting Room

Trained volunteers will be available to answer questions and prepare personal tax returns.

Event details

item.title: English Conversation Circle
item.description:
Tuesday, March 31, 2026 at 1 PM

Location: Central Library, Level 4 - Room 1

Practice your English Conversation skills with other adult learners.Practique su inglés.Luyện tập tiếng Anh của quý vị.练习英语。練習英語。英会話の練習をしましょう。Ku Celceli Ingiriisigaaga.እንግሊዘኛዎንይለማመዱ።እንግሊዘኛኹምተለማመዱ።Afaan Ingilizii kee shaakali.Практикуйте вашу англійську.Практикуйтесь в английском языке.Pratiquez votre anglais.Practique seu inglês.

Event details

item.title: AI Essentials for Jobs: Boosting Your Job Search Strategy
item.description:
Tuesday, March 31, 2026 at 1:30 PM

Location: Central Library, Level 4 - Room 2

Discover how to effectively use Artificial Intelligence (AI) to enhance your job search and all aspects of your application and interview preparation. 

Event details

item.title: Banking Basics
item.description:
Tuesday, March 31, 2026 at 5:30 PM

Location: Central Library, Level 4 - Room 2

Learn how about checking and savings accounts, use debit cards, and other basic banking tools.

Event details

item.title: Global Reading Challenge City Final
item.description:
Tuesday, March 31, 2026 at 5:30 PM

Location: Central Library, Level 1 - Auditorium

Join us for the Final of the Reading Trivia Competition for students in Seattle Public Schools.

Event details

item.title: Conceptos Básicos Bancarios
item.description:
Thursday, April 2, 2026 at 5:30 PM

Location: Central Library, Piso 4 - Sala 2

Aprenda sobre las cuentas de cheque y ahorros, el uso de tarjetas de débito y otras herramientas bancarias básicas.Evento en español.

Event details

item.title: One Book, One Coast: Densho - Looking Back and Looking Ahead
item.description:
Saturday, April 4, 2026 at 2 PM

Location: Central Library, Level 1 - Auditorium

Join us for this important conversation about Densho and their history-preserving work.

Event details

item.title: El Club Latino: "Pájaros en la boca y otros cuentos"
item.description:
Sunday, April 5, 2026 at 3:30 PM

Location: Central Library, Piso 8 - Sala de reuniones

Participe en el Club de Lectura en español. El libro de este mes es "Pájaros en la boca y otros cuentos" de Samanta Schweblin.Evento en español.

Event details

item.title: Collection Spotlight Exhibit

item.title: La Hora de Cuentos en la Biblioteca Central
item.description:
Monday, April 6, 2026 at 10:30 AM

Location: Central Library, Área para niños

Durante la hora de cuentos, los niños de 0 a 5 años y sus familias pueden disfrutar de historias, canciones y divertidas actividades de aprendizaje. Evento en español.

Event details
